rawAssistant: Marsh travel, eh? Got to watch out for that poison on Emberfox. You'll need some Antidote, at least one vial. Maybe a Shock Tonic if you haven't got some of those already in your kit. And don't forget Cold Salve, just in case things get chilly. I also recommend a few more bedrolls and some twine – can never have too much on the road.
